ItacPersonItem.Notes: Montalbano received a degree in law at the University of Padua, while he was boarder in Galileo`s house. He later chose the military career. At one of the sessions of the Ricovrati Academy in 1604, Montalbano delivered a very learned speech, in `verso sciolto`, on the origins of poetry, the epic poem, lyric poetry, and spoke about comedy and tragedy.
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
